context: Tests whether the agent can build a watchOS 26 RelevanceKit relevant-widget plan without falling back to a normal timeline-only widget.

checklist.name: Relevant widget API
checklist.description: Uses `RelevanceConfiguration` with `RelevanceEntriesProvider` for one-card-per-meeting Smart Stack behavior instead of only a normal timeline widget.

checklist.name: Availability
checklist.description: Annotates or clearly scopes relevant-widget-only code to watchOS 26.0+.

checklist.name: Ordered relevance
checklist.description: Returns `WidgetRelevance` with `WidgetRelevanceAttribute` values ordered by priority and using appropriate date `RelevantContext` clues.

checklist.name: Preview and placeholder
checklist.description: Handles `context.isPreview` with representative preview data and provides placeholder content.

checklist.name: Duplicate-card handling
checklist.description: Uses `.associatedKind(_:)` when a relevant widget overlaps with an existing timeline widget, or correctly explains grouping when that is the better fit.
